offer: For independent medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual billing causes delayed payments. We automate billing instead of manual billing and coding.
problem: manual billing processes lead to delayed payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Participate in Indie Hackers discussions on billing tools
DM outreach to clinics with demo video
Engage in community forums for medical billing solutions
try_it: Let users try manual entry for initial setup and basic reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for insights
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for follow-ups
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
